findings.claim: ADR-0006's Decision section treats `src/config/load.ts` as a live, currently-present source file whose current content (accepting only `nygard`/`madr` as declarable dialects) the decision's reasoning depends on.

citations.quote: loose can never be a *declared* dialect (`src/config/load.ts` only accepts `nygard`/`madr` as declarable)

findings.consequence: If this file no longer exists at this path, or no longer contains this dialect-restriction logic, the correction ADR-0006 records may no longer describe the codebase's actual behavior.

findings.claim: ADR-0018's Decision section treats `parse.ts` as a live, currently-present file that houses the consolidated CommonMark-correct link parser shared by D3 and D7.

citations.quote: link parser (`parse.ts`), adopted by D3 and D7

findings.consequence: If `parse.ts` no longer exists at this path, the consolidation this ADR records as having closed the founding false-positive class may have decayed or moved.

findings.claim: ADR-0018's Decision section treats `paths.ts` as a live, currently-present file housing the repo-containment primitive (`existsWithinRepo` / `escapesRepoRoot`) shared by D3 and D7.
findings.consequence: If `paths.ts` no longer exists at this path, the shared containment primitive this ADR describes as consolidating D3 and D7 may have decayed or moved.

findings.claim: ADR-0020's Decision section treats the npm package `mdast-util-from-markdown` as a live, currently-adopted dependency providing the tool's spec-compliant CommonMark reference-extraction parser.
findings.consequence: If this package is no longer a dependency of the project (e.g. removed from the manifest or replaced), the resolution-module architecture this ADR records may no longer match the codebase.

findings.claim: ADR-0030's Context section treats `src/checks/` as a live, currently-present directory that the parity guard mechanically monitors for changes requiring an accompanying Tier 0 fixture change.

citations.quote: ADR-0027's parity guard mechanically requires every change under `src/checks/` to ship

findings.consequence: If this directory no longer exists at this path (e.g. checks were moved or renamed), the parity guard's scoping as described here may no longer match the codebase's actual layout.
